name: 3sc-platform
description: AI-Powered Customer Support & Issue Management Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:portal && npm run build:console
scripts.build:packages: npm -w packages/types run build && npm -w packages/utils run build && npm -w packages/config run build && npm -w packages/theme run build && npm -w packages/permissions run build && npm -w packages/auth run build && npm -w packages/api run build && npm -w packages/realtime run build && npm -w packages/hooks run build && npm -w packages/ui run build
